channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Parking machine near Tesco, 2nd April
item.description:
Please fix the parking payment machine near Tesco!!! It is always not working. Also, the PayByPhone app has started charging £2.63 for 30 minutes, even though all the signs say that parking is free.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass by telegraph pole, 2nd April
item.description:
The glass was in a Wine Society box that DHL reported as having broken contents. The company asked DHL to recover the box on Tuesday, but they haven’t. In the meantime, council refuse collectors have taken the box, but left the broken glass on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again, 2nd April
item.description:
In the alleyway/entrance to NCP car park is more runnush bern dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Passey Place, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated parking on double yellow, blocking crossing, 2nd April
item.description:
Almost every morning this car is parked on the double yellow, blocking the accessible dimpled crossing. Preventing partially sighted people from crossing the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin collection aftermath, 2nd April
item.description:
The bin men seemed to find it difficult to empty the green boxes into the truck without spilling half of it onto the middle of the road. This is a weekly occurrence and litter and waste quickly builds up in the street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilldrop Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cabinet doors fly tipped, 2nd April
item.description:
Flight tipped cabinet doors on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing trees, 2nd April
item.description:
Hello, Along Fairfield road there are several empty spots where trees are missing. Please could we request some more trees along the road?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer blocking pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
There is fridge freezer left outside the corner house of Malton Street that has been there for a week
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the wall, 2nd April
item.description:
FixMyStreet ref: 9117182 From 16th March. Very visible large white letters on the brickwork. Visible from the road. On the side of the brick building close/right next to the tram tracks. Opposite 41 Rectory Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park entrance/exit gate lock, gate is by the scouts hall., 2nd April
item.description:
Park entrance/exit gate lock, gate is by the scouts hall.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 2nd April
item.description:
Car abandone on the corner of Ancona and Brewery roads. There is a car engine hanging out the boot! This car is untaxed and has been here several days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge in front of 24 26 sholden gardens Orpington needs cutting this area is always left, 2nd April
item.description:
Grass verge in front of 24-26 sholden gardens Orpington needs cutting as it always left and never done also behind shrub in front of 28-30 sholden gardens needs weeds and rubbish cleared

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5A, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on Pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
The occupants of 9 Albyfield moved our aprox 6 weeks ago. On the day they left the deposited a quantity of rubbish on the pavement. It comprises of approximately 8 plastic sacks and a green wheely bin. The normal refuse collectors have examined this rubbish on several occasion but refused to take it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albyfield, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Little drain in front of 24-26 sholden gardens Orpington on grass verge, 2nd April
item.description:
Drain has no cover and has been stuffed with rubbish this needs to be cleared and to have a cover put on it before it creates a bigger problem. Thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5A, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coundown unit not connecting to server, 2nd April
item.description:
The countdown display shows text but it's not connecting to the server. It's been this way for some time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fortess Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DUMPED 3 CO-OP GREEN BAGS O/S No 3, 2nd April
item.description:
Resident reporting the elderly resident that lives at No 3 is an elderly lady who has fly tipped 3 bags around the Tree, she is known to Highways that this has become her habit please could we get the bags removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping along Lynmouth rd, 2nd April
item.description:
Flytipping and rubbish all along Lynmouth rd from corner of Darenth rd all the way down to A10, often in the tree pits

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynmouth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste left, no collection over several weeks, 2nd April
item.description:
Household waste left accumulating here for several weeks, no collection.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Ayres Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere on path grass verge and behind shrub ion front of 24 26 28 30 sholden gardens Br54ba, 2nd April
item.description:
This is a constant issue because bins left outside properties all the time bins need to be put away on non bin days to stop this happening and to stop the vermin/ foxes cats shitting and pulling everything out of bins the area is so dirty all the time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5A, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate is locked along f/path 150 Burnt Oak Lane End, 2nd April
item.description:
Gate is locked along f/path 150 Burnt Oak Lane End - the gate is leading into The Glades Open Space where the lake is....caller wants to know why this is padlocked when it is normally open and can it be unlocked
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaucer Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
